notes: This is a TX/RX extender kit comprising two separate units: AT-HDR-EX-100CEA-TX (transmitter) and AT-HDR-EX-100CEA-RX (receiver). The HDMI ports are HDMI 2.0b (graded as hdmi-2.0). The UTILITY ports are physically Mini-USB (5-pin mini-A); the schema lacks a mini-usb entry so usb-micro is used as the closest match. The RS-232 and IR signals share a single captive screw (euroblock) connector on each unit (5-pin on TX, 6-pin on RX). The receiver has no separate power connector — it is powered over HDBaseT via PoE from the transmitter. The transmitter DC power input is a 2-pin captive screw terminal (euroblock-dc) fed by the included external 48V supply. LAN pass-through speed is 100 Mbps (HDBaseT limitation). The kit uses visually lossless compression for 4K/60 4:4:4 HDR extension over 100 m Cat6/6A.

ports.name: HDMI IN
ports.note: On transmitter unit (AT-HDR-EX-100CEA-TX). HDMI 2.0b spec, HDCP 2.2, 18 Gbps, 4K/UHD 60Hz 4:4:4, HDR10/Dolby Vision.

ports.name: HDBaseT OUT
ports.note: On transmitter unit. RJ45 connector carrying HDBaseT signal (video, audio, Ethernet, control, PoE) up to 100 m over Cat6/6A.

ports.name: OPTICAL OUT
ports.note: On transmitter unit. Return audio output from receiver (ARC path from display back to TX side).

ports.name: RS-232 / IR
ports.note: On transmitter unit. 5-pin captive screw (euroblock) carrying both RS-232 serial and IR control signals.

ports.name: UTILITY
ports.note: On transmitter unit. Listed as Mini-USB (5-pin); closest match in schema is usb-micro. Used for firmware updates.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: On transmitter unit. 100 Mbps Ethernet pass-through port.

ports.name: DC 48V
ports.note: On transmitter unit. 2-pin captive screw (euroblock) DC power input. Powered by included AT-PS-483125-C 48V/1.25A external supply. Transmitter powers receiver via PoE over HDBaseT.

ports.name: HDMI OUT
ports.note: On receiver unit (AT-HDR-EX-100CEA-RX). HDMI 2.0b spec output to display.

ports.name: HDBaseT IN
ports.note: On receiver unit. RJ45 connector receiving HDBaseT signal from transmitter. Also carries PoE power to receiver.

ports.name: OPTICAL IN
ports.note: On receiver unit. Return audio input (e.g. from TV optical out) sent back to transmitter over HDBaseT.

ports.name: RS-232 / IR
ports.note: On receiver unit. 6-pin captive screw (euroblock) carrying both RS-232 serial and IR control signals.

ports.name: UTILITY
ports.note: On receiver unit. Listed as Mini-USB (5-pin); closest match in schema is usb-micro. Used for firmware updates.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: On receiver unit. 100 Mbps Ethernet pass-through port.
